message:
feat(fp-frame): add rolling skew/kurt, Series.item, and DataFrame.rename_index

- Rolling.skew()/kurt(): rolling window skewness and kurtosis
- Series.item(): extract scalar from single-element Series
- DataFrame.rename_index(mapping): rename index labels via mapping
- DataFrame.rename_index_with(func): rename index labels via function
- 4 new tests (860 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
